title: taraxacum humifusum
intro: Taraxacum humifusum, also known as low-growing dandelion, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the dandelion genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, which can help to reduce swelling and alleviate conditions such as urinary tract infections. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including improving digestion, reducing blood pressure, and supporting liver function. Taraxacum humifusum is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies and supplements.
